rows.label: qev041003_MSG0020
rows.name:
Usually a much more decent
bodyguard comes, but... I ended
up drawing a terrible dud-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0021
rows.name:
But since I already signed the contract, it
can't be helped-mo. We'll hand over the
weapons and have him hurry up and work-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0022
rows.name:
Harvey! Stop touching the cargo
without permission-mo! That is
a very important item-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0023
rows.name: Haha! I got it, I got it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0024
rows.name:
...So, Boss? What exactly is
the contents of this thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0025
rows.name:
There's no need to say anything about
that-mo! As long as you protect the
cargo just as you were told...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Ah, you came back-mo. Hey,
did you get the weapons-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0027
rows.name:
If you got them, I want you
to quickly hand them over-mo.
First is the Iron Sword-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0041
rows.name: Second is the Warrior Assault-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0042
rows.name: Third is the Titanium Shield-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yes, perfect-mo. Harvey, you have
no complaints with this, right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0029
rows.name:
I ain't got no dissatisfaction with
gear like this. I'll properly
protect you and the cargo, Boss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0030
rows.name: Haa... I can't trust him-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0031
rows.name:
...From your perspective, does
this Harvey look like he can
properly protect Zazazan-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041003_SEL0031
rows.name: State that he seems to have the capability.

rows.label: qev041003_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041003_SEL0041
rows.name: Warn that he cannot be trusted.

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0032
rows.name:
If you say so, I'll believe him a little bit-mo.
But, if I had just left it to you from the start,
I wouldn't have had to go through such trouble-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0033
rows.name:
Haa... there are all
sorts of Earthlings-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0034
rows.name:
That's right-mo... With this guy as a
bodyguard, I'm anxious whether we can even
cross the White Tree Continent...-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0035
rows.name:
Haa... If I had just left it
to you from the start, it
wouldn't have come to this-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Anyway, thank you-mo.
Please accept this reward-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0037
rows.name: Heheheh, you folks wrap up your talk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0038
rows.name:
...We are departing immediately-mo.
You should also learn from the
brisk way this person works-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0039
rows.name:
Yeah, yeah, just leave it to me! As long
as I have a weapon, there ain't an enemy
anywhere that can stand up to this Harvey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041003_MSG0040
rows.name:
Now, let's get going. Our destination
is NLA! The journey begins![ST:wait ]
